programs.title: Caught!
programs.desc: Shopping trips are part of everyone's daily routines, but if tensions flare between angry customers and fed-up workers, it can result in more than just damaged goods.

programs.title: Caught!
programs.desc: Criminals try anything to avoid capture, but specially trained police use non-lethal methods to leave bad guys tased and confused; an officer risks life and limb atop a moving vehicle, and an escaped convict puts on the charm to avoid being captured.

programs.title: Caught!
programs.desc: People take advantage of every element, especially fire, water, ice, and air, when performing dangerous stunts and concocting crazy contraptions.

programs.title: Caught!
